## Daemon Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Beast of Nurgle (Cost: 5 Glory)

Only a Warband with the Nurgle Shared Patron can recruit this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Beast of Nurgle | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 60mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Beast of Nurgle is always equipped with its Putrid Appendages. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Putrid Appendages.** Melee, CLEAVE 2, INFECTION MARKERS

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Beast of Nurgle have \-1 DICE.  
* **Grotesque Regeneration.** At the end of each Turn, remove all BLOOD MARKERS from the Beast of Nurgle.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, FEAR, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Chaos Spawn (Cost: 4 Glory)

A Chaos Cult Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Chaos Spawn | 8”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | \-2 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Chaos Spawn is always equipped with thick hide and its Hideous Mutations, included in its statistics above. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Hideous Mutations.** Melee, CLEAVE D3, \+1 INJURY DICE

**Abilities**

* **Mind-Breaking Mutations.** Enemies within 3” of the Chaos Spawn treat all of their enemies as if they had the FEAR Keyword.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, FEAR, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Daemon Prince (Cost: 7 Glory, or 8 for winged)

A Chaos Cult or Chaos Daemons Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Daemon Prince | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-3 | 60mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Daemon Prince is always equipped with Daemonic Hellplate, a Hellforged Weapon, and an Infernal Cannon, included in its price and statistics above. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Hellforged Weapon.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY, TWO-HANDED. When attacking, choose to either make an extra attack against a different enemy or gain AMOUR PIERCING 1\.  
* **Infernal Cannon.** 24”, \+1 INJURY DICE, BLAST 2”, HEAVY, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED

When you recruit a Daemon Prince, you must choose one of the following Types. If your Warband leader has the KHORNE, NURGLE, SLAANESH, or TZEENTCH Keyword, you must choose the corresponding option or Daemon Prince of Chaos.

* **Daemon Prince of Darkness.** The Daemon Prince and all allied models within 6” of it have the STEALTH Keyword.  
* **Daemon Prince of Khorne.** The Daemon Prince’s melee attacks have an additional \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, and it gains the KHORNE Keyword.  
* **Daemon Prince of Nurgle.** The Daemon Prince treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword), and it gains the NURGLE Keyword.  
* **Daemon Prince of Slaanesh.** The Daemon Prince gains \+1” movement speed, \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, and the SLAANESH Keyword.  
* **Daemon Prince of Tzeentch.** The Daemon Prince’s ranged attacks have an additional \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, and it gains the TZEENTCH Keyword.

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Daemon Prince have \-1 DICE.

**Upgrades**

* **Wings.** The Daemon Prince can be given wings for an additional \+1 Glory, granting it 8” movement and FLYING.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, ELITE, LARGE, STRONG, TOUGH

#### Summoned Flesh Hound (Cost: 3 Glory)

Chaos Daemons cannot take this Mercenary. Only a Warband with the Khorne Patron can recruit this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Flesh Hound | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | 0 | 60 x 35mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Flesh Hound is equipped with a Burning Roar and Gore-Drenched Fangs. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Burning Roar.** 8”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE, FIRE  
* **Gore-Drenched Fangs.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Flesh Hound have \-1 DICE.  
* **Hunter from the Warp.** Flesh Hounds have \+1 DICE to all Dash, Climb, and Jump Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, KHORNE

#### Summoned Nurgling Swarm (Cost: 2 Glory)

Chaos Daemons cannot take this Mercenary. Only a Warband with the Nurgle Patron can recruit this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Nurgling Swarm | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | 0 | 50mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Nurgling Swarm counts as if it were wielding a Close Combat Weapon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Nurgling Swarm have \-1 DICE.  
* **Inevitable.** The Nurgling Swarm moves only half as far when Dashing (i.e. 3”).  
* **Mischief Makers.** Enemies in melee with one or more Nurgling Swarms suffer \-1 DICE to Hit with all attacks, even if they are not attacking a Nurgling Swarm.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, LARGE, LIMITED POTENTIAL, NURGLE, SWARM, TOUGH

#### Summoned Screamer (Cost: 2 Glory)

Chaos Daemons cannot take this Mercenary. Only a Warband with the Tzeentch Patron can recruit this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Screamer | 10”/Flying | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Screamer is equipped with a Lamprey Maw. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Lamprey Maw.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Screamer have \-1 DICE.  
* **Slashing Dive.** The Screamer can move within close combat range of enemies even when it is not Charging, and it can end a Charge anywhere within close combat of the target(s). If it is not Charging, it still must end this movement outside of close combat. The first time during its Activation it moves through any given enemy in this way, that enemy receives 1 BLOOD MARKER.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, FLYING, NO PROMOTION, TZEENTCH

#### Summoned Seeker (Cost: 3 Glory)

Chaos Daemons cannot take this Mercenary. Only a Warband with the Slaanesh Patron can recruit this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Seeker | 10”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | 0 | 60 x 35mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Seeker is equipped with a Lashing Tongue and two Slashing Claws. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Lashing Tongue.** Melee, takes no hands and can be used to make an extra attack when the Seeker takes the Fight Action.  
* **Slashing Claw.** Melee, CRITICAL, IGNORE OFF-HAND

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Infernal Enrapturess have \-1 DICE.  
* **Unholy Speed.** The Seeker has \+1 DICE to all Dash and Jump Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, LARGE, INFILTRATOR, SLAANESH

### 0-2 Summoned Daemons

You can take a maximum of 2 of the following Summoned Daemons total. A single Pink Horror counts as 2 for this limit.

#### Summoned Furie (Cost: 2 Glory)

A Chaos Daemons Warband cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Summoned Furie | 10”/Flying | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Summoned Furie is equipped with two Daemonic Claws, included in its cost. It IGNORE OFF-HAND when attacking with these weapons. It cannot be equipped with any other weapons, armour, or equipment.

* **Daemonic Claw.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Bloodmaster have \-1 DICE.  
* **Prey on the Weak.** The Chaos Furie ignores the Armour of Down enemies.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, FLYING, UNDIVIDED

#### Summoned Bloodletter (Cost: 2 Glory)

Chaos Daemons and any Warband with the Slaanesh Shared Patron cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Bloodletter | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+2 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Summoned Bloodletter is equipped with a Hellblade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Hellblade.** Melee, VICIOUS 10, CRITICAL, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Bane of Cowards.** When an enemy in close combat with the Bloodletter Retreats, the Bloodletter has \+1 DICE to Hit and Injure for its free attack against that model.  
* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Bloodletter have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, KHORNE

#### Summoned Daemonette (Cost: 2 Glory)

Chaos Daemons and any Warband with the Khorne Shared Patrron cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Summoned Daemonette | 8”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Summoned Daemonette is equipped with two Slashing Claws, included in its cost. It IGNORE OFF-HAND when attacking with these weapons. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Slashing Claw.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Infernal Enrapturess have \-1 DICE.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, FEAR, SLAANESH

#### Summoned Plaguebearer (Cost: 2 Glory)

Chaos Daemons and any Warband with the Tzeentch Shared Patron cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Summoned Plaguebearer | 5”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Summoned Plaguebearer is equipped with a Plaguesword. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Plaguesword.** Melee, INFECTION MARKERS, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Plaguebearer have \-1 DICE.  
* **Disgustingly Resilient.** The Plaguebearer treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).  
* **Inevitable.** The Plaguebearer moves only half as far when Dashing (i.e. 3”).  
* **Infected Outbreak.** Enemies in close combat with the Plaguebearer that have any INFECTION MARKERS have \-1 DICE to all Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, NURGLE

#### Summoned Blue Horror (Cost: 2 Glory)

Chaos Daemons and any Warband with the Nurgle Shared Patron cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Summoned Blue Horror | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Summoned Blue Horror is equipped with Coruscating Blue Flames, Blue Claws, and an Icon of Tzeentch. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Coruscating Blue Flames .** 18”, \-1 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, PSYCHIC, RISKY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Blue Claws.** Melee, \-1 INJURY DICE, TWO-HANDED  
* **Icon of Tzeentch.** The equipped model’s Blue Claws gain the FIRE Keyword.

**Abilities**

* **Brimstone.** When the Blue Horror is taken Out of Action, you can choose up to two enemy models within 6” of it. Each chosen model must succeed at a Success Roll or gain 1 BLOOD MARKER. An enemy with NEGATE FIRE is immune to this effect.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, LIMITED POTENTIAL, TZEENTCH

#### Summoned Pink Horror (Cost: 5 Glory)

Chaos Daemons and any Warband with the Nurgle Shared Patron cannot take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Summoned Pink Horror | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+1 | 0 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Summoned Pink Horror is equipped with Coruscating Pink Flames and Pink Claws, included in its cost. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Coruscating Pink Flames .** 18”, FIRE, PSYCHIC, RISKY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Pink Claws.** Melee, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Pink Horror have \-1 DICE.  
* **Split.** When the Pink Horror is taken Out of Action, place two Blue Horrors as close as possible to the Pink Horror’s location. They join your Warband for the remainder of the battle, then disappear. They do not count towards your number of models for the purpose of Morale.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, TZEENTCH
